prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为4286→3641→3073→5985→5755。2021–2023年位次持续前移（竞争加剧），2024年因考试模式改革（文理分科改为物理类/历史类 ）及专业组细分，位次大幅后移至5985，2025年小幅回升至5755，近两年基本稳定在5700–6000区间；该校在安徽省物理类招生计划2021年119人、2022年115人 、2023年122人、2024年123人、2025年125人，呈逐年小幅扩招趋势；2026年计划131人，较2025年增加6人（+4.8%），扩招幅度略高于往年，对竞争有一定缓解作用，但幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中山大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021年第12名、2022年第12名、2023年第11名、2024年第11名、2025年第12名、2026年第 13名，稳居全国顶尖高校行列，综合实力强劲；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及学术不端事件（论文数据存疑等），可能对部分考生报考心理产生一定抑制；抖音热度排名第29（较热），短视频曝光量较高，但内容中负面舆情占比较高；历史投档异常方面，2022年中山大学在多个省份出现断档（中关注），2023年投档线异常（低关注 ），2024–2025年亦有相关信号，显示该校在部分年份存在报考热度波动；第五轮学科评估中，中山大学A-及以上学科达23个，包括工商管理A+、生态学A+、中 国语言文学A、数学A、物理学A、生物学A、基础医学A、临床医学A-、口腔医学A-、计算机科学与技术A-等，学科覆盖面广、整体实力突出，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、临床医学、电气工程等专业持续高热推荐，与中山大学优势学科高度匹配；安徽省2026年普通高考总人数约45.1万，较2025年（约46.2万 ）略有下降，物理类考生估算约31.3万（较2025年32.1万略降约2.4%），竞争压力略有缓解2025年物理类本科批461分、特殊类型514分，与2024年（465/514）基 本持平，难度变化不大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次5755、2026年扩招4.8%、声誉偏负面可能抑制报考热度（位次数字进一步 增大）、考生总数略降（竞争略缓解）等因素，预计2026年物理类最低位次在5921基础上小幅上移至约5951名，区间5451–6451名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 4286 → 3641 → 3073 → 5985 → 5755. Rankings moved forward from 2021 to 2023 (intensified competition). In 2024, due to exam mode reform (switching from arts/science division to Physics/History categories) and finer major grouping, rankings significantly dropped to 5985, then slightly recovered to 5755 in 2025, stabilizing around 5700–6000 in recent two years. Enrollment plans in Anhui for Physics Category: 119 in 2021, 115 in 2022, 122 in 2023, 123 in 2024, 125 in 2025, showing a gradual slight expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 131, an increase of 6 (+4.8%) from 2025, slightly higher expansion than previous years, which somewhat alleviates competition but to a limited extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sun Yat-sen University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranked 12th in 2021, 12th in 2022, 11th in 2023, 11th in 2024, 12th in 2025, and 13th in 2026, consistently among the top universities in China with strong overall strength. In 2026, reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents (questionable paper data, etc.), which may suppress some candidates' application psychology. Douyin popularity ranks 29th (relatively hot), with high short video exposure, but negative public opinion accounts for a high proportion. Historical admission anomalies: in 2022, Sun Yat-sen University experienced gaps in multiple provinces (medium attention), in 2023 abnormal admission cutoffs (low attention), and signals in 2024–2025, indicating fluctuations in application popularity in some years. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Sun Yat-sen University had 23 disciplines rated A- or above, including Business Administration A+, Ecology A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, Mathematics A, Physics A, Biology A, Basic Medicine A, Clinical Medicine A-, Stomatology A-, Computer Science and Technology A-, etc., covering a wide range of disciplines with outstanding overall strength, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Clinical Medicine, and Electrical Engineering remain highly recommended, closely matching Sun Yat-sen University's advantageous disciplines. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Anhui is about 451,000, slightly down from about 462,000 in 2025. Estimated Physics Category candidates are about 313,000 (slightly down about 2.4% from 321,000 in 2025), easing competition slightly. In 2025, the undergraduate batch cutoff for Physics Category was 461 points, special type 514 points, basically unchanged from 2024 (465/514), with little change in difficulty.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 5755, 4.8% enrollment expansion in 2026, negative reputation possibly suppressing application popularity (ranking number further increasing), and a slight decrease in total candidates (slightly easing competition), it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly rise from 5921 to about 5951, with a range of 5451–6451.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 5951, range 5451–6451. Candidates with rankings at the lower end of the range (within 5451) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 top majors like Clinical Medicine Eight-Year Program and Stomatology. Candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (about 5951) should prioritize Tier 2 majors such as Electronic Information, Mathematics, and Clinical Medicine (Shenzhen), while also attempting Tier 1. Candidates with rankings near the upper end of the range (around 6451) are advised to use Tier 3 majors like Business Administration and Law as safety options, while also considering Tier 2 majors with relatively lower ranking requirements.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including Liberal Arts) were 704 → 700 → 659 → 713 → 663 respectively. The overall fluctuation range is approximately 650–715. Rankings moved slightly forward from 2021 to 2023, shifted back to 713 in 2024 due to exam mode reform, and rebounded to 663 in 2025, showing small fluctuations in recent years with no clear trend. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Anhui Province was 43 in 2021, 43 in 2022, 35 in 2023, 34 in 2024, and 34 in 2025, showing a recent trend of contraction. The 2026 plan is 31, a decrease of 3 (-8.82%) from 2025, a relatively large contraction that may intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sun Yat-sen University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. It consistently ranks among the top 13 nationally in the Soft Science ranking, with top-tier comprehensive strength and profound liberal arts heritage, exerting strong appeal in humanities and social sciences. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (academic misconduct incidents), which may suppress some candidates' application psychology. Douyin popularity ranks 29th (relatively hot), with high exposure. Regarding historical admission anomalies, Sun Yat-sen University experienced gaps in multiple provinces in 2022 (medium concern), with related signals in 2023, indicating fluctuations in application popularity. The university's liberal arts advantages are prominent: Chinese Language and Literature A, Philosophy A-, Law A-, Sociology A-, Foreign Languages and Literatures A-, Business Administration A+, etc., strongly attracting high-scoring liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popularity of liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature shows differentiation from wait-and-see to recommendation, overall stable. The estimated number of History Category candidates in Anhui Province for 2026 is about 138,000 (slightly down about 2.4% from 141,400 in 2025), easing competition slightly. In 2025, the History Category undergraduate batch line was 477 points, special type 515 points, slightly higher than 2024 (462/512), increasing difficulty slightly.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 663, the 2026 enrollment contraction of 8.82%, the negative reputation possibly suppressing application popularity (ranking number increases), and the slight decrease in total candidates (competition slightly eases), it is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will slightly move up from 628 to about 643, with a range of 570–716.
